summary: Attack path visualizer with customizable icons and interactive arrow rotation
architectural_notes: Attack path visualizer includes customizable icon set for various network elements
Arrow elements support free-form rotation via click-and-drag interaction
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Man icon illustration for attack path diagram (man-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Multiple users icon illustration showing group of people (multiple-users-icon.dim_128x128.png)
- Multiple computers icon illustration showing multiple computer devices (multiple-computers-icon.dim_128x128.png)

existing_features.title: Replace the existing user icon with a man icon in the attack path elements section. The icon should follow the same dimension pattern as existing icons (64x64 or 128x128 PNG) and be placed in frontend/public/assets/.
Add a Multiple Users icon to the attack path elements section in AttackPathToolbar. The icon should be a new draggable element following the same pattern as existing icons.
Add a Multiple Computers icon to the attack path elements section in AttackPathToolbar. The icon should be a new draggable element following the same pattern as existing icons.
Enable click-and-drag rotation for arrows in the attack path visualizer. Users should be able to click on an arrow and drag to freely rotate it around its connection points.
Remove the 'Export as PNG' functionality from the attack path visualizer. This includes removing the export button from AttackPathToolbar and any associated export logic.

new_feature_requests.summary: Replace user icon with man icon in attack path visualizer
Add Multiple Users icon to attack path elements
Add Multiple Computers icon to attack path elements
